description:
I use Globie eSIM when I travel (20% off): https://globie.io/luke20

Receive daily emails from me: https://lukedamant.com/emails

Join my Patreon for early access to videos, extended cuts, exclusive content and more: https://www.patreon.com/cw/lukedamant

Migingo Island, Kenya ➖ Between the international waters of Kenya, Uganda and Tanzania lies an Island. An island that is home to over 500 people, yet is just half the size of a football pitch. Migingo Island is one of the most crowded islands in the world, and a place that is heavily disputed between Kenya and Uganda. I decided to travel there myself to see what it’s really like to live on this tiny rock and meet the people who call it home.

my autistic friend who joined me
@kieranbrowntravel
